Item 1A of this Form 10-K under the heading "Risk Factors." The Company assumes no obligation to revise or update any forward-looking statements.

Unless otherwise stated, all information presented herein is based on the Company's fiscal calendar.

ITEM 1A. RISK FACTORS

Our business, reputation, results of operations, financial condition and stock price could be adversely affected by a number of factors.

We face intense competition in the markets for devices, services and software.

ITEM 1B. UNRESOLVED STAFF COMMENTS

None.

See Item 7 of this Form 10-K for discussion of results of operations.

ITEM 7. MANAGEMENT'S DISCUSSION AND ANALYSIS OF FINANCIAL CONDITION AND RESULTS OF OPERATIONS

Net sales increased during the year primarily due to higher iPhone and Services revenue.

The Company considers macroeconomic conditions, supply constraints and foreign exchange impacts.

ITEM 7A. QUANTITATIVE AND QUALITATIVE DISCLOSURES ABOUT MARKET RISK

Market risk discussion.
